findings: smoke coverage never exercises stuck-agent detection; the tested agent is happy-path only and completes immediately
there is no restart or recovery-after-failure path for agents that crash, exit nonzero, or strand tasks in claimed/
pid tracking is created but never asserted through a dead-worker or orphaned-claim recovery test
partial result write handling is untested; no case leaves a .tmp- artifact behind
polling only distinguishes result present vs absent, so failures are not diagnosed as crash vs slow run
metaswarm smoke coverage kills the session but does not validate recovery from stuck squad-leads or partial child-agent ledger state
